ticket_title: Implement queue/detail/step surfaces for core process cluster
implemented_output: Updated core queue/detail/step surfaces for S044, S045, S046, S047 and S051
implementation_summary: Replaced the old S044 phase/projection panels with a product-native decision-room core surface.
Removed the duplicate S044 page heading/detail-standard stack so the core decision work appears first.
Resolved the S044 long-screen audit findings by removing dead left-side whitespace, moving gate checks into the work context and deleting the duplicate access-block panel.
Reworked S044 and S045 field layouts to avoid narrow text fragments in the 1400x900 primary-task audit.
Anchored S045, S046, S047 and S051 with route-owned EPIC-12 contract metadata and step-pendant attributes.
Removed the redundant S043 rationale/evidence/audit-history context strip after visual review; those responsibilities remain on their owned downstream screens.

screen_coverage.coverage: Decision input, gate checks, output readiness and blocker state are visible in the decision-room core surface.
Decision result and audit/evidence follow-up are contract-anchored as a decision-success surface.
Evidence vault master/detail/drawer surface is contract-anchored for evidence review and blocked sharing.
Evidence detail surface is contract-anchored for provenance/source/history review.
Audit history is now a first-class DOMAIN-I pendant surface with contract-backed audit-history attributes.

validation.notes: Covers S043 strip removal, S044-S047/S051 route-owned core surfaces and EPIC-12 primary-surface long-screen audit checks.

validation.command: PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3126 pnpm exec playwright test tests/operational-visual-audit.spec.ts --grep "(043|044|045|046|047|051)"
validation.notes: Existing non-negotiable harness currently contains S046, S047 and S051 for this grep; S043-S045 are covered by the EPIC-12-specific primary-surface audit in tests/decision-record-evidence-audit-ui.spec.ts.

validation.command: PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3125 pnpm exec playwright test tests/route-smoke.spec.ts --grep "(044|045|046|047|051)"
validation.notes: Earlier parallel run hit a Playwright dev-server port collision; separate rerun passed.

screenshot_proof.notes: S043 after redundant rationale/evidence/audit-history strip removal.
S044 core decision-room surface after removing old phase/projection and duplicate heading/detail panels.

positive_acceptance: S044-S047 and S051 each expose a route-owned EPIC-12 core surface.
S044 exposes input, gate, output and blocker UI for the decision-room process cluster.
S043-S045 now have EPIC-12-specific primary-surface long-screen audits for 1400x900 visibility, no horizontal overflow, no summary banner and no narrow text fragments.
S051 is explicitly anchored as audit_history for BP-082/BP-083 instead of being an unrelated governance page only.
S043 no longer shows a redundant context card strip below the selected decision workbench.
negative_acceptance: Core surfaces do not render EPIC/BP ids, process-first/proof wording, route ids or page ids as visible product copy.
S044 does not claim client acceptance, evidence sufficiency, export readiness or release bypass.
S043 does not overextend into rationale/evidence/audit proof; those remain on their owned screens.

next_ticket.recommendation: Proceed to proof/audit/client-safe boundaries, with special attention to fail-closed audit persistence and no-overclaim copy in modal/result states.
